Metadata.title: The District Ekkamai | Genuine Hostel Service
Metadata.description: Discover the best hostel experience in Ekkamai, Bangkok.

FloatingMessenger.scanInstruction: Open the LINE app on your mobile device and scan the QR code to connect with us.

StoryPage.title: Our Story
StoryPage.description: Crafting genuine hostel hospitality in the vibrant heart of Ekkamai district.
StoryPage.firstContent1: We didn't just choose Ekkamai; we were born here. This neighborhood is our backyard, our playground, and our home. Having lived here our entire lives, we know every hidden shortcut, every aroma of street food, and the pulse of every street corner.
StoryPage.firstContent2: The District was born from a shared dream among five close friends: Tul, Tam, Pim, Prim, and Money. We came together with a single mission: to transform a piece of our family heritage—an old family building—into a sanctuary for travelers who crave an authentic connection to our neighborhood.
StoryPage.secondContent1: When you stay with us, you're staying with locals who truly care. Our team is a small, tight-knit circle of family and friends dedicated to providing a high-vibe, genuine hostel experience. Whether you need a recommendation for the best local coffee or a guide to Ekkamai's nightlife, we’ve got you covered.
StoryPage.secondContent2: We’ve poured our hearts into every detail of this project, turning a storied building into a modern hub for explorers. We can’t wait to share our Ekkamai with you. Welcome to the family. Welcome to The District.

filter.noResults: No articles found matching your search.

StayPage.description: Our luxury stays are currently being prepared to offer you the ultimate Ekkamai experience.

commonAmenities.powerOutlet: Personal power outlet and USB port

districtA.subtitle: Shared Dormitory with 8 Bunk Beds
districtA.description: District A is our vibrant shared dormitory designed for social travellers. With 8 bunk beds, high-speed Wi-Fi, and a welcoming atmosphere, it's the perfect base to meet fellow adventurers exploring Bangkok.
districtA.detailDescription: District A features thoughtfully designed bunk beds with personal privacy curtains, individual reading lights, and personal power outlets. Shared bathrooms are maintained to the highest standards of cleanliness.
districtA.closingText: District A is where friendships begin. Join our community of travellers and make your Bangkok stay unforgettable.

districtB.subtitle: Shared Dormitory with 8 Bunk Beds
districtB.description: District B offers the same vibrant dormitory experience as District A, with 8 bunk beds and a lively communal energy. Ideal for budget-conscious travellers who don't want to compromise on comfort.
districtB.detailDescription: District B features the same premium bunk bed setup with privacy curtains, individual lighting, and secure lockers — all within easy reach of the hostel's shared facilities.
districtB.closingText: District B is your affordable home in the heart of Ekkamai. Great value, great vibes.

districtC.subtitle: Private Large Room for up to 6 Guests
districtC.description: District C is our spacious private large room, perfect for groups or families. With 4 bunk beds plus a queen bed, a private bathroom, Smart TV, and high-speed Wi-Fi, it delivers comfort and privacy in one.
districtC.detailDescription: District C features a generous layout with 4 bunk beds and 1 queen bed, a private en-suite bathroom, Smart TV with cable and streaming, and premium amenities throughout.
districtC.closingText: District C is the ultimate group retreat — private, spacious, and designed for those who travel together.

districtD.subtitle: Private Compact Room for up to 3 Guests
districtD.description: District D is our cosy private compact room with 3 bunk beds and a private bathroom. Ideal for small groups or friends looking for their own space without breaking the budget.
districtD.detailDescription: District D packs smart design into a compact footprint — 3 bunk beds, a private bathroom, and all the essentials you need for a comfortable stay in Bangkok.
districtD.closingText: District D proves that great things come in small packages. Your own private corner of The District awaits.

districtE.subtitle: Private Family Room for up to 4 Guests
districtE.description: District E is our warm and welcoming family room, sleeping up to 4 guests with 2 bunk beds and a queen bed. Complete with a private bathroom and Smart TV, it's the perfect family getaway.
districtE.detailDescription: District E is thoughtfully designed for families, offering 2 bunk beds and 1 queen bed, a private en-suite bathroom, Smart TV, and ample space for everyone to feel at home.
districtE.closingText: District E is where family memories are made. Comfortable, private, and perfectly placed in Ekkamai.

districtF.subtitle: Private Compact Room for up to 3 Guests
districtF.description: District F mirrors District D's compact charm — 3 bunk beds, a private bathroom, and everything you need for a smart, comfortable stay in Bangkok's most exciting neighbourhood.
districtF.detailDescription: District F is an efficiently designed private room with 3 bunk beds and a private bathroom, offering the perfect balance of privacy and value for small groups.
districtF.closingText: District F is smart travel done right — your own private space at an unbeatable price in Ekkamai.

districtG.subtitle: Private Family Room for up to 4 Guests
districtG.description: District G is our second family room, offering the same generous layout as District E — 2 bunk beds, a queen bed, private bathroom, and Smart TV. A perfect home base for families visiting Bangkok.
districtG.detailDescription: District G provides a warm, private setting for families with 2 bunk beds and 1 queen bed, a private en-suite bathroom, Smart TV, and all the comforts of home in the heart of Ekkamai.
districtG.closingText: District G is your family's home away from home. Explore Bangkok by day, retreat in comfort by night.
